#<adress> <value1inDecimal><value2inDecimal>
#This file is input to a python script that converts the decimal values into..
#FP16 value in this format : <adressFP16><value1_FP16value2_FP16>..and that file..
#..will be the one to provide as input to the testbench of the register file
#assuming 24 registers per thread...
#ONLY FILLED THE CONTENT related to HMMA set 0, step0 R4, R22, R12, R4.
#ONLY FILLED THE CONTENT UTILIZED BY TENSOR CORE UTILIZED BY OCTET 0 (threadgroup0, threadgroup4) and OCTET 1 (threadgroup1, threadgroup5)
#*********************************
#THREADGROUP0 -part of octet 0 
#*********************************
